fields.name: feeType
fields.description: type of fee - percentage of total amount (PERCENTAGE) or fixed amount (VALUE)

fields.name: feeValue
fields.description: value of the fee, e.g. "100" or "12.50"

fields.name: currencyCode
fields.description: currency code of the fee in [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217) format, e.g. USD, EUR
